profile.title: Profile
profile.localOnlyNote: This data is saved only in this browser. To place an order, message us on WhatsApp — the manager will get in touch.

1.name: Aidana
1.text: Not my first order here. Sneakers are originals, packaging like from a boutique. 10/10.

2.name: Timur
2.text: Ordered Tech Fleece — picked it up the same day at the store. Manager replied fast, size was right.

3.name: Begaiym
3.text: Best streetwear selection in Bishkek. Prices ok, brands really top.

4.name: Ilya
4.text: Bought reseller Yeezys — deadstock condition just like promised. Respect.

delivery.title: Delivery & payment
delivery.subtitle: Pickup in Bishkek and delivery across Kyrgyzstan
delivery.footerCta: The manager will quote the exact tariff and timing for your order — message us on WhatsApp with the delivery address and order details.

pickup.title: In-store pickup
pickup.body: Free pickup from the store at Togolok Moldo 5 / Kievskaya, Bishkek. Every day 10:00 — 21:00. Message us on WhatsApp before you visit and the manager will have your size ready.

bishkek.title: Courier in Bishkek
bishkek.body: In-city delivery is usually same-day or next-day. The price depends on your district and order weight — the manager will confirm the exact amount during checkout on WhatsApp.

regions.title: Across Kyrgyzstan
regions.body: We ship via CDEK, Yandex Delivery, or local courier services — picking the fastest and most affordable option for your destination. Standard transit time is 1–3 days nationwide.

timing.title: Timing
timing.body: Pickup — instant. Bishkek courier — today or tomorrow. Regions — 1–3 days. During peak periods (sales, holidays) timing may stretch; the manager always confirms the actual ETA at checkout.

payment.title: Payment
payment.body: Card (Visa / MasterCard / Elcart), bank transfer to the store account, or cash on pickup. For region orders we usually request a transfer before shipment; cash on delivery is available case by case — discuss with the manager.

returns.title: Returns & exchanges
returns.subtitle: 14-day return and exchange policy
returns.footerCta: Still have questions about a return? Message the manager on WhatsApp with your order number — we'll sort it out fast.

conditions.title: Return conditions
conditions.body: Returns are accepted if the original packaging, tags, receipt, and product condition are intact. Footwear must not have been worn outdoors — once they hit the street, the return cannot be processed.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.body: You have 14 days from delivery to request a return. After that, returns aren't accepted, except for manufacturing defects.

exclusions.title: What can't be returned
exclusions.body: Underwear and socks after unpacking. Accessories and care products after use. Items with tags removed. Items with visible signs of wear or use.

defect.title: Defective items
defect.body: Send us photos and a short video on WhatsApp on the day you receive the item. We'll arrange the return shipment at our expense and either refund you or offer an exchange for the same or an equivalent item.

process.title: How to start a return
process.body:
1. Message the manager on WhatsApp with your order number and the reason for the return.
2. Agree on a return method: courier in Bishkek, or shipment via a delivery service for regions.
3. Once we receive the item and verify its condition, we refund within 1–3 business days using the original payment method.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to typical customer questions
faq.footerCta: Didn't find your answer? Message the manager on WhatsApp — we reply within an hour during work hours.

originals.a: Cornerkg only sells originals. Some items are deadstock from official distributors or their authorized partners; some are resell with verified provenance. Each item is checked against serials, tags, packaging, and reference photos before going on the site.

payment.a: We accept card (Visa / MasterCard / Elcart), bank transfer to the store account, and cash on pickup. The manager will send full payment details on WhatsApp after you place the order.

delivery.q: How long does delivery take in Bishkek and across Kyrgyzstan?
delivery.a: Within Bishkek — usually same-day or next-day by courier. Across Kyrgyzstan — 1–3 days via CDEK, Yandex Delivery, or local services. Exact tariff and timing depend on the chosen method — the manager confirms during checkout.

returns.q: Can I return or exchange an item?
returns.a: Yes, within 14 days if the original packaging, tags, receipt, and product condition are preserved. Footwear must not have been worn outdoors. Underwear and accessories after use are non-returnable. If the item arrived defective — we'll cover the return shipment and refund or exchange.

tryOn.q: Can I try items on before buying?
tryOn.a: Yes, visit the store at Togolok Moldo 5 / Kievskaya, Bishkek, every day 10:00 — 21:00. If your size isn't on the floor right now, the manager will check stock and prepare the item for fitting — message us ahead on WhatsApp.

size.q: What if my size isn't in stock?
size.a: Message us on WhatsApp — the manager will check the store and the vintage line (@corner_classickg). If your size isn't physically here, we can order it in; usually 7–14 days depending on brand.

regions.q: I'm outside Bishkek. How do I order?
regions.a: Place an order via the cart or message WhatsApp directly. We ship via CDEK / Yandex Delivery or a local courier. Payment is by transfer before shipment or cash on delivery, depending on the region and order amount.

contact.q: What's the fastest way to reach you?
contact.a: WhatsApp +996 709 99 32 89 — we reply within an hour during work hours. You can also DM Instagram @cornerkg_ or visit the store at Togolok Moldo 5 / Kievskaya.

about.title: About the store
about.subtitle: Cornerkg in Bishkek — streetwear, reseller, originals
about.footerCta: Want to know more or get advice on a specific pair? Message the manager on WhatsApp.

who.title: Who we are
who.body: Cornerkg is a streetwear and sneaker store in Bishkek. We're not a marketplace with a million SKUs — we're a curator. We pick what we'd wear ourselves and what we'd happily recommend to friends.

what.title: What we sell
what.body: Original sneakers from Nike, Jordan, Yeezy, New Balance, and others. Hoodies and tees from cult streetwear brands. Outerwear and accessories. Some items are deadstock from official distributors; some are rare resell that's hard to find on the open market.

where.title: Where to find us
where.body: Store: Togolok Moldo 5 / Kievskaya, Bishkek. Every day, 10:00 — 21:00. Main Instagram: @cornerkg_. The vintage line lives separately at @corner_classickg.

why.title: Why people trust us
why.body: We play the long game with our customers, so fakes and shady stock don't make it through our doors. Each item is checked against serials, tags, packaging, and reference photos before going on the site. If anything doesn't add up, the item simply doesn't get listed. One honest pair beats ten 'sort-of-original' ones.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.subtitle: We've been notified. Try refreshing the page.
